nasb.text: “Woe to the shepherds who are destroying and scattering the sheep of My pasture!” declares the Lord.

esv.text: “Woe to the shepherds who destroy and scatter the sheep of my pasture!” declares the Lord.

cnv.text: “那些殘殺和趕散我牧場上的羊群的牧人，有禍了！”這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“那些本应像牧人照顾羊群一样统治我子民的人有祸了！因为他们残害、驱散我的子民。”
